# Newton's Second Law

## Short Teaching Summary
Newton's Second Law: One newton (1 N) is the resultant force that gives a mass of 1 kg an acceleration of 1 m/s^2 in the direction of the force. Map connection: this idea links by example_of, requires to nearby concepts. Pause point: say the main idea in one short phrase before moving on.
